classification_definitions.A: 真跑过 completed，body 已验证，starter 账号可用
classification_definitions.B: create 200 但 job 失败或 poll timeout；协议对但上游不稳
classification_definitions.C: 端点通过验证但缺 SPA-only artifact (仅剩 cinema_studio_3_5_video_edit)
classification_definitions.X: 不可用；分子类 X1/X2/X4/X5 见 x_class_breakdown_definitions

x_class_breakdown_definitions.X1: 前端 SPA JS bundle 已注册 enum，但 backend 返 "Unsupported job set type" —— 后端未实装 / 新功能待发布
x_class_breakdown_definitions.X2: 3D 输出（.obj/.glb），endpoint 活但 OpenAI 兼容 server 不处理 3D
x_class_breakdown_definitions.X4: 前后端都不认识（backend enum 有名但前端未接、后端未实装 = 后端孤儿）
x_class_breakdown_definitions.X5: 前端 enum 独有，后端 v2 enum 没有

nano_banana_animal.note: DEPRECATED 2026-07-06 — SPA routes /apps/animal-clone and /apps/nano-banana-animal both return 404. API endpoint /jobs/nano-banana-animal still exists but no public preset catalog. Front-end should fall back to nano_banana_2 with an animal prompt.

nano_banana_2_skin_enhancer.note: Verified via SPA capture 2026-07-06. Real preset_ids below. Body needs application_slug:"skin-enhancer" at top level, and output_width+output_height in params.
nano_banana_2_skin_enhancer.fetchFromSPA: /apps/skin-enhancer (upload image → click preset card) — no longer required, uuids captured above.

skin_enhancer.note: Alias of nano_banana_2_skin_enhancer. Same preset_ids apply.
skin_enhancer.fetchFromSPA: /apps/skin-enhancer — no longer required, uuids captured above.

text2image_soul_v1.note: RESOLVED 2026-07-06 via public API endpoint /soul/presets?size=100. Full catalog (106 items) snapshotted to catalogs/soul_v1_presets.json. No SPA scraping needed.
text2image_soul_v1.fetchFromSPA: No longer required — API catalog available at /soul/presets?size=100

cinema_studio_3_5_video_edit.note: target_artifact_id is a SPA-internal uuid. Exhaustive probe 2026-07-06 confirms it's NOT exposed anywhere in the public API surface for a completed cinematic_studio_video_3_5 parent job.
cinema_studio_3_5_video_edit.fetchFromSPA: Complete a cinematic_studio_video_3_5 in the real SPA → open timeline → click a shot → capture target_artifact_id from Network tab. Frontend workaround: prompt user to paste artifact_id from URL of SPA timeline (higgsfield.ai/cinematic-studio/<project_id>?shot=<artifact_id>).

exhaustiveNegativeProbe_2026_07_06.result: ALL 404. API responds 'Target artifact not found on parent job' for every uuid tried, and no endpoint returns per-shot artifact_ids. multi_shots:true is stored in params but the completed job response yields a single merged mp4 (results.raw.url), no per-shot list. Confirmed: SPA-only via WebSocket/SSR/client segmentation.

text2image_soul_v2.body_hint: Minimum working shape (verified 2026-07-17 starter/von7qxenjs): params requires prompt, width, height, batch_size, seed, style_id. style_id must come from catalogs/soul_v2_presets.json. No aspect_ratio, resolution, or style object needed.

image2video_mix.body_hint: frames: literal 49|81. motions[].value: motion uuid from catalogs/motions.json. motions[].type: motion|reference. strength: float 0-1.

topaz_video.body_hint: enhancement.model enum: iris-3/prob-4/ahq-12/rhea-1/slp-2.5/gh...; grain is an object with {strength,size}. frame_interpolation.model: apo-8|chr-2.

nano_banana_2_skin_enhancer.body_hint: Verified via SPA capture 2026-07-06. preset_id options: Soft skin=0ed5bcd5-0963-4483-90ea-54c359720727, Realistic skin=d4138357-912a-47c7-9b12-f3d3ab1c2338, Imperfect skin=fbb56f37-0249-4021-ba92-17e22665b154. output_width+output_height required.

skin_enhancer.body_hint: Verified via SPA capture 2026-07-06. preset_id options: Soft skin=0ed5bcd5-0963-4483-90ea-54c359720727, Realistic skin=d4138357-912a-47c7-9b12-f3d3ab1c2338, Imperfect skin=fbb56f37-0249-4021-ba92-17e22665b154. output_width+output_height required.

nano_banana_2_relight.body_hint: light_source enum: mdl/mdr/mul/mur/fml/fmr/fdl/fdr (~26 values). light_quality: hard|sharp|soft. brightness: int 0-100.

watermark.body_hint: input_video is at BODY TOP LEVEL (not in params).

kling_omni_image_reference.body_hint: kling_element_ids from catalogs/reference_elements.json (empty by default — must be user-created).

nano_banana_2_ai_stylist.body_hint: outfit_preset_ids uses collage type by default; other categories in catalogs/outfits_ai_stylist_*.json.

kling2_6_motion_control.body_hint: medias needs [image, video]. character_orientation: image (default). mode: std.

ai_influencer.body_hint: No catalog needed for basic mode. For outfit-driven, add outfit_preset_ids like nano-banana-2-ai-stylist.

catalog_refs.reference_elements: catalogs/reference_elements.json (must be user-created; empty by default)

cinematic_studio_image_grid.body_hint: camera_* ids from catalogs/camera_settings.json[i]. grid_type: freeform|shots|zooms|next_shots|prev_shots. grid_size: 2x2|3x3|4x4.

catalog_refs.kling_element_ids: catalogs/reference_elements.json (must be user-created; empty by default)

catalog_refs.voice_type: literal enum: "preset" (also used with voice_id from reference_voices)

text2speech_v2.body_hint: voice_id from catalogs/reference_voices.json (paired with model=minimax/elevenlabs, voice_type="preset").

catalog_refs.reference_elements: catalogs/reference_elements.json (must be user-created; empty by default)
catalogs/reference_elements.json (must be user-created; empty by default)
catalogs/reference_elements.json (must be user-created; empty by default)

marketing_studio_video.body_hint: Alternatively, use params from a preset in catalogs/marketing_formats.json[].presets[].params (contains full body).

catalog_refs.reference_elements: catalogs/reference_elements.json (must be user-created; empty by default)

marketing_studio_hook.body_hint: Requires hook_id from catalogs/marketing_hooks.json; setting_id from catalogs/marketing_settings.json.

marketing_studio_brand_kit_scrape.body_hint: scrap_url is any brand website — server crawls product info.

marketing_studio_brand_kit_agent.body_hint: brand_kit_id must come from a completed marketing-studio-brand-kit-scrape job.

catalog_refs.reference_elements: catalogs/reference_elements.json (must be user-created; empty by default)

cinema_studio_3_5_video_edit.blocker: API 层通过（parent_job_id 有效）。target_artifact_id 是 SPA 客户端切片生成的独立 UUID，parent job 响应里所有 UUID 都返 404，穷尽 8 组 sub-endpoint 全 404。**必须走 SPA UI，唯一真 SPA-only 模型**。

llm_text.body_hint: Free-pool text generation, no catalog needed.

clipify.body_hint: urls array of source videos to compile.

inworld_text_to_speech.body_hint: voice = string id from catalogs/voices.json (also try refVoice for compatibility).

autosprite.body_hint: kind=custom + name required when prompt is provided.

speech2text.body_hint: Upload an audio via /audio, then reference it via {id,type:audio_input,url}.

spa_workflow.how: Headed 浏览器点 Cinema Studio 3.5 timeline shot → 抓 target_artifact_id

wait_for_backend_rollout.how: higgsfield 后端启用这批 job_set_type 后自动可用

authoritative.server/data/SEALED.json: 本文件 (v1-sealed)。所有 216 模型的完整状态。
authoritative.server/data/final-classification.json: 6 类归属 + X 子类拆分 + c_class_blockers（本文件 models 字段的原始数据）
authoritative.server/data/master-index.json: 前端一次拉齐的服务化 index（VERIFIED_MODELS + templates + catalogs）
authoritative.server/data/v2-supported-enum.json: 权威 base = 216 个 job_set_type（源自 API 报错响应）
authoritative.server/data/frontend-enum.json: 前端 SPA JS bundle 提取的 165 个 enum → job_set_type 映射

catalog_and_templates.server/data/body-templates/*.json: 122 个 body template（每模型 exampleBody + bestPracticeBody）
catalog_and_templates.server/data/spa-only-presets.json: 5 个 SPA-only 模型的手动指南（含 skin-enhancer preset_id + soul-v1 style_id）

cost.server/data/cost-detail.json: 108 模型的成本汇总（10 endpoint + 107 实测 log）
cost.server/data/cost-map.json: 简化 job_set_type → cost 映射

archived_probes.note: 以下文件保留在 server/data/archived/ 供历史追溯，不再引用
files: b-class-*.json (7 files, B 类多轮验证过程)
c-class-*.json + c-blocker-probe.json (5 files, C 类批量测试过程)
x-class-*.json + definitive-x-check.json + live-recheck.json (5 files, X 类前后端交叉核对过程)
e-class-unprobed.json + last-e-class-test.json (2 files, E 类未探测清算过程)
spa-*captured*.json (10 files, SPA 抓包中间产物)
